evals.prompt: My carousel arrows don't work and cards get cut off on mobile. The prev/next buttons seem to do nothing when clicked.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses carousel navigation issues (state management, translateX calculation, maxIndex boundary), checks mobile basis-full requirement, and provides a working carousel implementation with proper arrow controls and boundary handling.

evals.prompt: I have cards on my homepage with rounded-lg and cards on my pricing page with rounded-xl, and some use bg-white while others use bg-card. Can you make them all consistent?
evals.expected_output: Identifies card pattern drift across pages, recommends standardizing to a single radius token and bg-card color token, and provides a unified card pattern with consistent radius, padding, shadow, and colors.

evals.prompt: Audit all my components for consistency. I feel like buttons, cards, and grids look different on every page.
evals.expected_output: Inventories all component instances across the codebase, fingerprints their styling properties, compares for drift, and generates a component consistency audit report with specific deviations and recommended standardizations.
